MINI MINUTES: This cause assigned to Dept. 218 for Settlement Conference. Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Eric Throne. Arnold W. Evje, Esq. appeared for Plaintiff, Chinatown Commuinity Development Center and Defendant, Monte Metz appeared in pro per. The matter settled per written stipulation of parties which is read into the record. Trial date is vacated.
